scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/lib/analyze.js && node --check src/lib/env.js && node --check src/lib/foundry.js && node --check src/lib/platforms.js && npm --prefix client run build
